### Direct Download Link

Please paste the direct download link of the file you want to download in the box below.
https://example.com/path/to/your/file.zip


---

**Guide:**
- The link must be **direct**; meaning clicking on it should start the file download.
- Please enter only **one** link per request.
- After submitting the request, the bot will automatically download the file and place it in the `downloads/` folder of this repository.
- The final download link will be sent to you in response to this Issue.
